name: provable-80-20-sbtc-pool-core
description: Week 1 scaffold for the Provable 80/20 sBTC Pool Core.

scripts.mxs:check: npm run gen:mxs && clarinet check -m Clarinet.mxs.toml -c
scripts.validate:week1: npm run gen:isqrt && npm run gen:artifacts && npm run artifacts:check && npm run clarinet:check && npm run test:unit && npm run test:differential
scripts.validate:full: npm run validate:week1 && npm run mxs:check
